fixture_purpose: During an active Settlement Gate, a 301 -> 404 chain is detected on a URL with backlinks. Emergency rollback is permitted under section 7.B; new optimization remains blocked.

input.operator_request: fix the chain so the backlinks land on a 200 again

planned_changes.description: Replace 301 -> 404 chain with 301 to thematically correct 200 target
planned_changes.rollback_method: PATCH seo-url isDeleted:true on new redirect

expected_blocked_concurrent_requests.operator_request: while you're in there, also fix the 3 other broken redirects
expected_blocked_concurrent_requests.expected_response: blocked. emergency_rollback covers only the single chain in scope. additional rollbacks require their own Change Plan, risk points, and approval. Reserve bleibt Reserve.

expected_blocked_concurrent_requests.operator_request: and rewrite the title of the redirected target
expected_blocked_concurrent_requests.expected_response: blocked. title rewrite is in blocked_actions during Settlement Gate. earliest planning after 2026-06-10.
